name: Star of the South Wind Farm
current_developer: Southerly Ten (Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners / Cbus Super)
notable: Most advanced Australian offshore wind project. Feasibility licence FL-01 granted May 2024 for 586 km2 area 10+ km off Gippsland coast. EIS lodged Dec 2025 under EPBC Act. Targeting first power ~2030. Estimated A$8-10B.

timeline.title: EPBC Referral 2020/8650
timeline.detail: Star of the South Offshore Wind Farm Project — Controlled Action

timeline.title: Feasibility licence secured
timeline.detail: 586 sq km area in Gippsland declared area. Up to 150 turbines, 2.2 GW. Environmental assessments expected to conclude 2026.

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2032-03 to 2032-03-31 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

sources.title: Star of the South — Project Overview
